subject: Discrete Random Variables
question: A probability distribution of the claim sizes for an auto insurance policy is given in the table below: Claim size, Probability — 20, 0.15; 30, 0.10; 40, 0.05; 50, 0.20; 60, 0.10; 70, 0.10; 80, 0.30. What percentage of the claims are within one standard deviation of the mean claim size?
